description:
The library `io.netty:netty-codec-smtp` version `4.1.116.Final` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/hzero-interface.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/netty-codec-smtp-4.1.116.Final.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2025-59419`, which exists in versions `< 4.1.128.Final`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jq43-27x9-3v86) with vendor severity: `High`.

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://www.depthfirst.com/post/our-ai-agent-found-a-netty-zero-day-that-bypasses-email-authentication-the-story-of-cve-2025-59419).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `4.1.128.Final` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=io.netty:netty-codec-smtp`.

The library `org.apache.tomcat.embed:tomcat-embed-core` version `10.1.34` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/hzero-oauth.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/tomcat-embed-core-10.1.34.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2025-24813`, which exists in versions `>= 10.1.0-M1, < 10.1.35`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-83qj-6fr2-vhqg) with vendor severity: `Critical` ([NVD](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-24813) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Sources: [CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog), [Exploit Database](https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/52134), Github [[1](https://github.com/absholi7ly/POC-CVE-2025-24813/blob/main/README.md), [2](https://github.com/absholi7ly/POC-CVE-2025-24813)], [VulnCheck](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework/master/modules/exploits/multi/http/tomcat_partial_put_deserialization.rb), [VulnCheck KEV](https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-03-14&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-24813).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `10.1.35` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.apache.tomcat.embed:tomcat-embed-core`.

>**Wiz Threat Research note:** 
>Use our [Host Configuration Rule](https://app.wiz.io/policies/host-configuration-rules#%7E%28filters%7E%28shortName%7E%28equals%7E%28%7E%27whcr-apachetomcat-003%29%29%29%29) in order to identify Apache Tomcat instances allowing Servlet write access.
